safeToProceed.description: True only when the wrapper has proven the guarded path is safe to proceed: either preflight-only passed without side effects, or the wrapper is about to exec the child without Vifty cooling after explicit uncooled fallback approval.

coolingRequested.description: The guarded-run decision payload is emitted only for no-cooling paths, before the wrapper exits or execs the child uncooled.

decisionReason.description: Machine-readable reason for the wrapper-level no-cooling decision or read-only preflight result so agents do not classify outcomes by parsing message text.

recoverySteps.description: Ordered payload-local recovery steps copied from viftyctl diagnose --json. Empty when no recovery is needed.

daemonRuntime.description: Raw daemonRuntime object from viftyctl diagnose when available. Agents should treat matchRequired=true with matchesExpectedDaemon not true as a hard stop before cooling or uncooled fallback.

requestedWorkload.description: The guarded-run workload class that was checked, such as build, test, localModel, or custom.

requestedDuration.description: The requested lease duration string after wrapper argument validation. This is not proof a lease was requested.

requestedMaxRPMPercent.description: The requested RPM cap percentage after wrapper argument validation.

reasonCharacterCount.description: Trimmed reason length only; the reason text is intentionally not copied into the decision payload.

childCommandName.description: Basename or PATH command token for the preflighted child command. Full paths and child arguments are intentionally omitted.

childCommandKind.description: Whether the child command was supplied as a path or resolved through PATH.

childArgumentCount.description: Number of child arguments after the command name. Argument values are intentionally omitted.
